mapper.select: SELECT * FROM my_plant WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND del_yn = 'N' ORDER BY reg_date DESC
SELECT * FROM my_plant WHERE plant_no = #{plantNo} AND del_yn = 'N'
mapper.update: UPDATE my_plant SET nickname = #{nickname}, photo_path = #{photoPath}, user_water_interval = #{userWaterInterval}, last_water_date = #{lastWaterDate} WHERE plant_no = #{plantNo} AND del_yn = 'N'
UPDATE my_plant SET del_yn = 'Y' WHERE plant_no = #{plantNo}
